question: I've been having migraines twice a week for the past month. I've taken ibuprofen every time. My doctor mentioned medication overuse headache. What is that?
I had a TIA — a mini stroke. My symptoms resolved in an hour. My neurologist said this was still very serious. Why?
I've been diagnosed with epilepsy after a single seizure. Do I really need to start anticonvulsant medication after just one event?
My MRI showed a lesion in my white matter. My neurologist is investigating MS. What are the diagnostic criteria for multiple sclerosis?
I have Parkinson's disease and my medications are wearing off before the next dose. What adjustments can be made to reduce motor fluctuations?
I've been having episodes of numbness and tingling in my hands and feet. My neurologist ordered an EMG. What does this test measure?
I have a severe unilateral headache around my eye that comes in clusters lasting weeks. My doctor thinks this is cluster headache. How is it treated?
My father has Alzheimer's disease. What are my chances of developing it and are there any early steps I can take to reduce my risk?
I was told my brain MRI shows a small meningioma. My neurologist recommends watching it. When do meningiomas need to be removed?
I have a tremor in my right hand that gets worse when I try to use it. Could this be Parkinson's disease or is there another cause?
My MS has been relapsing more frequently. My neurologist wants to switch me to a more potent disease-modifying therapy. What does escalation of MS treatment involve?
I have developed double vision and drooping of one eyelid over the past few weeks. My neurologist is concerned. What diagnoses are they considering?
I've been having memory problems and getting lost in familiar places. I'm 58. What workup is needed to evaluate early dementia?
I had a severe head injury three months ago and still have persistent headaches, difficulty concentrating, and mood changes. Is this post-concussion syndrome?
I was recently diagnosed with myasthenia gravis. My eyelids droop and I get weak when I exercise. How is this treated?
I have peripheral neuropathy from diabetes. My feet are burning and numb. What treatments help diabetic neuropathy?
I was told I have an unruptured intracranial aneurysm found on an MRI for headaches. What are the risks of observation versus treating it?
I have restless legs syndrome and it is severely affecting my sleep. What are the treatment options and do medications help?
My child had their first febrile seizure at age 2. The ER doctors said it was probably benign. Will it happen again and should I start antiepileptic medication?
I have been getting Botox injections for chronic migraine. My neurologist wants to switch me to a CGRP monoclonal antibody. How do these two treatments compare?
I have idiopathic intracranial hypertension with papilledema. My neurologist wants to do a lumbar puncture to check my pressure. What does elevated CSF pressure do to my vision?
I have a hereditary condition called Huntington's disease in my family. I'm considering genetic testing. What are the implications of testing positive?
I was diagnosed with Guillain-Barré syndrome. I'm getting weaker rapidly. What is the expected trajectory and what treatments are given?
I have focal epilepsy that is not controlled with two anticonvulsants. My neurologist mentioned epilepsy surgery. Am I a good candidate?
My CSF analysis after a lumbar puncture showed oligoclonal bands. What does this finding indicate?
I have sudden onset facial drooping on one side but I tested negative for stroke. My doctor said it's Bell's palsy. What is the treatment and prognosis?
I have a progressive motor neuron disease and was recently told it may be ALS. What does a diagnosis of ALS mean for my prognosis and care?
I have severe sciatica with leg weakness. My spine surgeon and my neurologist have different opinions on surgery. How do I weigh the options?
I take valproate for epilepsy and want to get pregnant. My neurologist is very concerned. What are the risks of valproate in pregnancy?
I recently had a stroke and now have spasticity in my arm. What treatments are available to reduce spasticity after stroke?
